lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model has a transport capacity of 6 ADEPTA SORORITAS INFANTRY models. It cannot transport JUMP PACK models or the Triumph of Saint Katherine.

At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select one BATTLE SISTERS SQUAD, DOMINION SQUAD or SISTERS NOVIATIATE SQUAD from your army. If you do, that unit is split into two units, each containing as equal a number of models as possible (when splitting a unit in this way, make a note of which models form each of the two new units. If you are splitting a unit that has the Cherub ability, only one of the new units can use that ability during the battle – make a note of which of the new units this will be). One of these units must start the battle embarked within this TRANSPORT; the other can start the battle embarked within another TRANSPORT, or it can be deployed as a separate unit.

lines.value: Each time this unit is selected to fight, you can choose to invoke its extremis trigger word. If you do, then until the end of the phase, arco-flails equipped by models in this unit have an Attacks characteristic of 6 and the HAZARDOUS ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has an invulnerable save of 6+

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective markers remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until you opponent controls it at the star or end of any turn.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has an invulnerable save of 6+

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, this model has a 2+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has an invulnerable save of 4+

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit makes a ranged attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per turn.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.value: This model has an invulnerable save of 6+

lines.value: While an ^^**Adepta Sororitas Character^^** is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

lines.value: This model has an invulnerable save of 6+

lines.value: If this unit has a Leader unit attached to it during the Declare Battle Formations step and this unit starts the battle embarked within a Transport, that Leader unit gains the Scouts 6" ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance, or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Models in this unit have an Invulnerable save of 6+.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly Adepta Sororitas unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit performs an Act of Faith, the value of one of the Miracle dice used in that Act of Faith is first changed to a 6.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has an invulnerable save of 4+

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with an Indirect Fire weapon scored a hit against an enemy unit, that unit must take a Battle-shock test. Each time such an attack destroys an enemy model that has the Deadly Demise ability, the model's Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 5+ instead of a 6.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has an invulnerable save of 6+

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return up to 1 destroyed model (excluding Character models) to that unit. If you wish, you first discard 1 Miracle dice; if you do, you can return up to D3+1 destroyed models (excluding Character models) to that unit instead.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has an invulnerable save of 6+

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has an invulnerable save of 6+

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time you gain a Miracle dice as the result of a friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS unit or model being destroyed, if that unit or model was destroyed within 12" of this model, you can re-roll the result of that Miracle dice before adding it to your Miracle dice pool.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a Save characteristic of 2+ and a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.value: This model has an invulnerable save of 4+

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model has a transport capacity of 6 ADEPTA SORORITAS INFANTRY models. It cannot transport JUMP PACK models or the Triumph of Saint Katherine.

At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select one BATTLE SISTERS SQUAD, DOMINION SQUAD or SISTERS NOVIATIATE SQUAD from your army. If you do, that unit is split into two units, each containing as equal a number of models as possible (when splitting a unit in this way, make a note of which models form each of the two new units. If you are splitting a unit that has the Cherub ability, only one of the new units can use that ability during the battle – make a note of which of the new units this will be). One of these units must start the battle embarked within this TRANSPORT; the other can start the battle embarked within another TRANSPORT, or it can be deployed as a separate unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

If this model is on the battlefield at the start
of your Command phase, you can choose one of the following:

■ Take a Leadership test for this model, if that test is passed, gain 1CP.

On a 2+, set that Celestine model back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

If this unit made a Charge move this turn, until the end of the phase, select both abilities above to apply to melee weapons equipped by models in this unit instead.

Provided that unit is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units and every model in that unit is within 3" of this TRANSPORT, it can embark within this TRANSPORT.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: When this FORTIFICATION is set up, all parts of it must be set up within 1" of another part. Friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS INFANTRY models can be set up or end any type of move on top of the floor sections of this FORTIFICATION. While an ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army is within 1" of this FORTIFICATION, that unit can perform one additional Act of Faith per phase.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.
